Landing.title: Own a piece of the energy transition.
Landing.sub: A transparent pool funding verified green projects. Every figure traces back to chain in two taps — no surprises, ever.
Landing.countersNote: Live from the vault contract. Tap any figure for its on-chain proof.
Landing.howSub: One pool, many projects. You deposit USDC and receive shares in a curated, oracle-scored portfolio.
Landing.step1Body: From one dollar. You always see what you receive before you sign.
Landing.step2Body: Shares — technically SEP-41 tokens called HBS. Your stake in the whole pool.
Landing.step3Body: Capital is deployed to verified, oracle-scored green projects.
Landing.step4Body: Share price reflects expected returns. Withdraw your liquid share anytime.
Landing.verifyBody: Trust is shown, not claimed. The contracts are public, the oracle cadence is documented, and the return formula is written out in plain sight.

Connect.title: Welcome — come in.
Connect.sub: Two ways in, both equally welcome. No wrong door.
Connect.walletBody: Connect Freighter, xBull, Albedo, Lobstr, Hana, or WalletConnect.
Connect.newBody: We'll create a secure wallet for you and help you add funds. No jargon required.
Connect.edu1Body: One curated pool funds many verified green projects. You own a share of all of it.
Connect.edu2Body: Shares — technically SEP-41 tokens called HBS. They track your stake in the pool.
Connect.edu3Body: You can withdraw what the pool holds liquid; the rest is working in projects. We always show how much is available.

Explore.title: Where the pool works
Explore.sub: Every project the pool funds, with oracle-verified scores. Explore freely — connecting a wallet comes later.
Explore.emptySub: There are no projects matching the "{filter}" category in the pool right now.

Deposit.amountH1: How much would you like to invest?
Deposit.preview: You'll receive ≈ <num>{shares} HBS</num> · share price <num>{price}</num> · network fee <num>< $0.01</num>
Deposit.liquidLine: Today the pool is 29% liquid — you can withdraw your liquid share anytime.
Deposit.reasonMin: Enter an amount of at least 1 USDC
Deposit.reviewH1: You're investing {amount} USDC in the pool
Deposit.reviewBody: Your shares represent a stake in the whole pool, which funds 14 verified projects. You can withdraw your liquid share at any time.
Deposit.pendingTx: tx a91f…3c0d · view on Stellar Expert ↗
Deposit.successBody: You received {shares} HBS and now back 14 verified projects.

Portfolio.liquidCaption: Your liquid share. The rest is working in projects.
Portfolio.impactBody: Your stake helps fund 14 verified projects across 6 countries.

ProjectDetail.notFoundBody: This project isn't in the registry. It may have been moved.
ProjectDetail.contributionBody: Your return is shaped by every project the pool backs. This one carries a credit quality of {credit} and a green impact of {green}, both refreshed on-chain by the oracle.
ProjectDetail.calcFormula: expected return = investment × (credit + green) ÷ 200 — read it in the contract ↗
ProjectDetail.investCta: Invest in the pool that funds this
ProjectDetail.investNote: You invest in the shared pool, which funds this project alongside others — not a per-project checkout.

Withdraw.capMessage: The pool holds limited liquidity right now; the rest is working in projects. You can withdraw up to ${cap} today, or any part of it.
Withdraw.reasonExceeds: Amount exceeds what is liquid right now — use Max
Withdraw.reasonMin: Enter an amount of at least 1 USDC
Withdraw.successBody: <num>${amount} USDC</num> is on its way to your wallet. Thanks for being part of the pool.

Admin.subtitle: Verify scores, deploy vault capital, and manage the creator whitelist. Every write is on-chain.
Admin.sectionRegistryCaption: Oracle-verified credit & green scores. Click a header to reorder; update inline.
Admin.sectionOracleCaption: Privileged writes to the registry and the vault.
Admin.sectionWhitelistCaption: Only approved creators can register projects in the ProjectRegistry.
Admin.toastRevokedMsg: {name} can no longer register new projects.
Admin.panelPushHint: Writes a new oracle reading to the ProjectRegistry.
Admin.panelFundHint: Deploys idle vault USDC into a project.
Admin.scoresHint: Current on-chain: credit {credit}, green {green}. Scores are 0–100.
Admin.fundExceeds: That is more than is liquid right now — lower the amount.
Admin.fundOk: Funding lowers liquid USDC by the same amount.
Admin.fundReasonEmpty: Enter an amount within the liquid balance.

Creator.subtitle: Apply for the whitelist, build your project page, and watch the pool fund it. The oracle scores your credit quality and green impact, and we show you exactly what moves them.
Creator.lookForSub: Clear, public criteria. Meet these and your application moves quickly.
Creator.applySub: Applications are usually reviewed within 3 business days.
Creator.fieldLinks: Links — website, registry, or proof of presence
Creator.submitAppReason: Add your organization name and location first.
Creator.submitAppThanks: Thanks — we will be in touch within 3 business days.
Creator.builderSub: This metadata lives off-chain and links to your on-chain registry entry.
Creator.dropCoverHint: PNG or JPG, shown on your card
Creator.previewPending: Credit and green scores show as pending until the oracle verifies your project. The {type} type and your story travel with this card across the atlas.
Creator.dashOracleEvalSub: Your scores are not a black box. These are the factors the oracle weighs — improve them and your scores follow.
Creator.stepInReviewHint: A reviewer is verifying your org and project.
Creator.stepApprovedHint: You hear back, approved or with next steps.
Creator.criteria0: A registered organization with a verifiable public presence.
Creator.criteria1: A green energy project at or past the permitting stage.
Creator.criteria2: A named location and a contact who can answer reviewer questions.
Creator.criteria3: Willingness to share metering or production data for oracle scoring.
Creator.criteria4: No outstanding regulatory actions against the organization.

ProjectDetail.notFoundBody: That project is not in the registry. It may have been moved.
ProjectDetail.contributionBody: Your return is shaped by every project the pool backs. This one carries a credit quality of {credit} and a green impact of {green}, both refreshed on-chain by the oracle.
ProjectDetail.calcFormula: expected return = investment × (credit + green) ÷ 200 — read it in the contract ↗
ProjectDetail.investCta: Invest in the pool that funds this
ProjectDetail.investNote: You invest in the shared pool, which funds this project alongside others — not a per-project checkout.
